subject: A massive serpentine creature with a fanged maw bursting up out of a churning lake or icy water, jaws wide open and tongue lashing as steam and spray erupt around it
description: A red-and-orange leviathan-like creature surges up from a body of dark water, its enormous fanged maw open wide with a long pink tongue lashing out. The beast's body is suggested in folds of fiery red, brown, and crimson scales, and the impact of its emergence sends torrents of water and steam exploding outward in white sprays. The water below is dark blue-black and choppy, lit from beneath by the heat of the creature itself. The overall composition is a single explosive moment of attack, with the creature centered and roaring directly at the viewer.
foreground: fanged maw of a fiery serpent-creature with lashing tongue, surrounded by exploding water and steam
background: dark choppy lake water with steam rising
